jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Marico
jsonLd.description:
Marico has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Marico:
Marico is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marico!
